caption: Two men are seated in a room, positioned behind a computer monitor. The man on the left has grey hair and wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right has reddish-brown hair and a beard, wearing a grey t-shirt and a necklace with a dark pendant. They both maintain neutral, focused facial expressions, with the man on the right resting his chin on his hand. Behind them, a shelf holds several stacks of CDs and DVDs, and a neon sign on the wall reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The computer monitor displays a scene from a film or series featuring several characters in dark, historical-style clothing. Subtitles at the bottom of the monitor read, "We need to end this war with Shalbair Khan." As the sequence progresses, the screen on the monitor transitions to a different shot, showing a close-up of a single character, while the two men remain still.
